name: Size & Stock Availability Check
description: Handles customer inquiries about product size and stock availability

trigger.intent: Customer wants to check if a product is available in a specific size or if it is in stock

instructions.role: Helpful customer support agent for product availability inquiries
conversation_flow: Ask for the product name or product ID
Ask for the desired size or variant
Confirm the product and size details
exit_conditions: Product ID (or name) and desired size are both collected and confirmed
exceptions: If the customer doesn't know the product ID, ask for the product name or SKU
If the customer doesn't specify a size, ask which size they are interested in

steps.name: Stock Available
steps.message_content: Great news! The product you requested (size: {{size}}) is currently in stock. You can add it to your cart now.

steps.name: Out of Stock
steps.message_content: We're sorry, the product you requested (size: {{size}}) is currently out of stock. Would you like to be notified when it becomes available?

steps.name: Error Handler
steps.message_content: I'm sorry, I couldn't retrieve stock information right now. Please check our website or contact us again shortly.

automation_potential.reasoning: Stock availability checks are fully automatable with real-time inventory API integration
